gear.name: 20L water jerry can
gear.description: A durable container for transporting and storing bulk water at home or in a vehicle.

gear.name: Collapsible water container
gear.description: A fold-flat backup container that can be packed in go-bags, cars, or camping kits.

gear.name: Sealed bottled water case
gear.description: Immediate drinking water that is easy to issue per person and rotate through normal use.

gear.name: Personal water filter straw
gear.description: A compact last-line option for treating natural water sources when mains or stored water is exhausted.

gear.name: Gravity water filter
gear.description: A low-effort group filter suited to households sheltering for days without safe tap water.

gear.name: Water purification tablets
gear.description: A lightweight backup treatment option for travel kits, vehicles, and flood response supplies.

gear.name: Shelf-stable meal kit
gear.description: Ready-to-eat meals and simple pantry staples that support a 72-hour plan without refrigeration.

gear.name: Canned protein supply
gear.description: Tuna, beans, or similar protein options that store well and can be eaten without cooking.

gear.name: High-energy snack pack
gear.description: Compact snacks that travel well in vehicles and go-bags for long queues or detours.

gear.name: Manual can opener
gear.description: A basic but essential tool for accessing stored food when power is unavailable.

gear.name: Portable camp stove
gear.description: A controlled backup cooking option for outdoor or well-ventilated use when mains power is lost.

gear.name: Insulated cooler
gear.description: Helps protect chilled medicine and food for a limited period when refrigeration is interrupted.

gear.name: Comprehensive first aid kit
gear.description: A stocked kit for cuts, burns, sprains, and immediate casualty care at home or on the road.

gear.name: Burn dressing pack
gear.description: Specialised dressings suited to cooking, generator, and radiant heat incidents.

gear.name: Oral rehydration salts
gear.description: Useful for dehydration, gastro illness, and recovery during heat or contaminated-water events.

gear.name: Prescription copy wallet card
gear.description: A compact record of medications and dosages that helps with refills or emergency treatment.

gear.name: Trauma shears
gear.description: Safe cutting shears for bandage work, clothing access, and medical kit use.

gear.name: Spare glasses kit
gear.description: Backup glasses with case and cleaning cloth to protect mobility and communication.

gear.name: 20,000 mAh power bank
gear.description: A high-capacity battery bank that can recharge phones, lights, and some radios multiple times.

gear.name: Small solar panel charger
gear.description: A portable recharging option for extended outages or off-grid travel.

gear.name: AA/AAA battery pack
gear.description: Fresh batteries for torches, lanterns, and radios stored in common emergency kits.

gear.name: USB car charger
gear.description: Lets the vehicle support phone and light charging during outages or evacuation travel.

gear.name: Outdoor-rated generator lead
gear.description: An outdoor-rated extension lead for safe generator use with essential appliances.

gear.name: Appliance surge protector
gear.description: Helps protect chargers and sensitive electronics when unstable power returns.

gear.name: Battery-powered emergency radio
gear.description: Receives official warnings and updates when mobile networks or internet access are unreliable.

gear.name: Hand-crank radio
gear.description: A self-powered backup radio suited to prolonged outages when batteries are limited.

gear.name: Emergency whistle
gear.description: A simple signalling tool for regrouping, attracting help, or marking location in poor visibility.

gear.name: Laminated contact sheet
gear.description: A waterproof sheet with key names, numbers, addresses, and emergency frequencies.

gear.name: Signal mirror
gear.description: A lightweight backup tool for attracting attention when travelling beyond coverage.

gear.name: Backup feature phone
gear.description: A simple secondary phone with long battery life that can be kept charged for outages.

gear.name: Fire blanket
gear.description: Rapid suppression equipment for small cooking fires and immediate flame contact incidents.

gear.name: ABC fire extinguisher
gear.description: A multi-purpose extinguisher for home, garage, and vehicle fire response.

gear.name: P2 mask pack
gear.description: Helps reduce smoke and ash inhalation during bushfire or heavy cleanup conditions.

gear.name: Leather work gloves
gear.description: Protective gloves for ember patrol, cleanup, handling debris, and hot equipment.

gear.name: Metal rake or shovel
gear.description: Useful for clearing small ember starts, moving debris, or shaping drainage flow.

gear.name: Spare hose fittings kit
gear.description: Keeps hoses operational for cooling, spot fires, or cleanup if a connector fails.

gear.name: Multi-tool
gear.description: A compact tool covering cutting, gripping, and small repairs for travel or household emergencies.

gear.name: Heavy-duty duct tape
gear.description: Useful for temporary repairs, sealing, splinting, and weatherproofing damaged items.

gear.name: Tarpaulin
gear.description: A fast weather barrier for damaged roofs, equipment, and temporary shelter needs.

gear.name: Folding shovel
gear.description: Supports digging drainage, recovery work, and camp or vehicle tasks when space is limited.

gear.name: Adjustable spanner
gear.description: Useful for shutting utilities, tightening fittings, and basic recovery tasks.

gear.name: Waterproof document pouch
gear.description: Protects IDs, insurance, medical notes, and cash in a single grab-and-go pack.

gear.name: Jump starter pack
gear.description: A portable battery booster for starting a flat vehicle without another car.

gear.name: Approved spare fuel container
gear.description: Provides a safe way to hold a limited fuel reserve for evacuation or isolated travel.

gear.name: Tyre repair kit
gear.description: Supports basic puncture management and helps avoid being stranded far from assistance.

gear.name: Recovery strap
gear.description: A basic recovery aid for soft ground and remote route travel when used correctly.

gear.name: Window breaker and seatbelt cutter
gear.description: A rescue tool that should be stored within reach of the driver.

gear.name: Reflective warning triangle
gear.description: Improves roadside visibility if you are stopped during poor weather or low light.

gear.name: LED torch
gear.description: A simple primary handheld light for blackouts, inspections, and moving safely indoors.

gear.name: Headlamp
gear.description: Hands-free light for first aid, cleanup, and walking in the dark.

gear.name: LED lantern
gear.description: Provides broader room lighting for sheltering, meal prep, and family movement at night.

gear.name: Glow stick pack
gear.description: A low-risk lighting fallback for children, tents, or marking exits in the dark.

gear.name: Rechargeable work light
gear.description: A brighter light source for repairs, cleanup, and garage or outdoor work.

gear.name: Bedside torch
gear.description: A dedicated bedside light to reduce falls during sudden night-time outages.

gear.name: Paper state map
gear.description: A broad-area paper map for alternate routing if devices fail or roads change quickly.

gear.name: Local topographic map
gear.description: Useful for understanding terrain, creek lines, and remote access routes.

gear.name: Baseplate compass
gear.description: A reliable navigation backup that works without batteries or network access.

gear.name: Offline GPS device
gear.description: A dedicated navigation tool with preloaded maps for remote or no-service travel.

gear.name: Grease pencil and notebook
gear.description: Useful for writing routes, marking maps, and leaving waterproof notes.

gear.name: Route marker tape
gear.description: Helps mark a path, hazard, or rally point in controlled remote travel situations.
